purpose: Top-level CMake project definition. Declares project MarkdownPlusPlus 1.0.0 (C + CXX), exposes the MARKDOWNPP_BUILD_NATIVE option (ON by default), and conditionally pulls in the MarkdownPlusPlus.Native subdirectory which builds the DLL. Requires CMake >= 3.24.
invariants: CMake minimum version 3.24 - the inner CMakeLists and CMakePresets.json (cmakeMinimumRequired 4.2) further raise it for VS2026 generation.
gotchas: Top-level project version (0.1.0) should be kept aligned with the FileVersion stamped by MarkdownPlusPlus.rc and the version string in PluginController::ShowAbout.
